tracks.rawText: 2:30**“Salsa y Luna / Salsa e Luna”**v5Italian folk–pop song with the **accordion as the main lead instrument**, The track is **driven by accordion melodies in the intro, verses, and chorus**, with mandolin and acoustic guitar only as support, Warm, lively rhythm section, light percussion, festive Mediterranean feel, The accordion must stay **front and center throughout the whole song**, carrying the hook and the main melody3PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:14**“Salsa y Luna / Salsa e Luna”**v5An upbeat fusion of Italian folk and modern pop, **led by accordion and mandolin** over syncopated drums, Verses feature nylon-string guitar and light percussion, building towards a lively chorus with lush harmonies, brass accents, and bright pizzicato strings1PublishRemix
